title: Redo One Weak Topic
studentTask: Study the assigned topic card, then attempt two similar questions without checking the answer first.
completionChecks: I can explain the concept in my own words.
I attempted the questions before seeing the answer.
I wrote one mistake to avoid next time.

title: Correct One Saved Mistake
studentTask: Choose one saved mistake, write the corrected rule, and solve one fresh question using that rule.
completionChecks: I identified why my first answer was wrong.
I wrote the corrected rule clearly.
I solved one new question using the corrected rule.

title: Explain One Revision Item
studentTask: Pick one pending revision queue item and explain it aloud or in a saved student note.
completionChecks: I selected one pending revision item.
I explained the answer without looking.
I saved a short note or marked the queue item complete.
